title: Deliberate Destruction of Federal Records During Transition
description: Outgoing administration officials destroy or conceal diplomatic communications and agency decision records during the transition period. The ACC investigates and prosecutes under the new transition-records rule in Art XIX §6.5, which treats deliberate destruction of public records during transition as anti-subversion conduct under Art VI §1.1.

details.records: diplomatic communications, agency legal opinions, and enforcement decision records
